summary: Iteration 3 testing of BRANE Marketplace bug fixes + promotion plans feature. Backend: 22/22 pytest tests passed (100%) covering admin wallets, ads (footer position), promotion plans CRUD, seller subscribe (wallet insufficient + PIX pending), admin approve/reject subscriptions, saved address, theme update persistence. Frontend: admin panel shows all 21 tabs incl. Planos/Escrow/Gestão Financeira; Escrow tab loads with totals & filters; Anúncios form includes 'Rodapé' (footer) option; /promote page renders 3 tier cards (Básico/Pro/Premium) each with 'Pagar com carteira' + 'Pagar com PIX'; HomePage AdSlot visible when ads exist (ad-slot-top rendered after creating a top ad).

minor.issue: Duplicate function declarations in server.py at lines 2287-2302 and 2469-2480+ — both pairs have @api_router decorators. Works (last wins) but confusing and risky.
AdCreate model docstring/comment (line 213) says '# top, between_products, sidebar' but 'footer' is now supported — update comment for clarity.

integration_issues.issue: No products visible on /desapega in current seed — could not UI-verify absence of buy-now-btn. Needs seed data or a desapega product for full UI validation. (Backend-level not tested because endpoint scope unclear; requirement was UI absent).

action_items: (Low) Remove duplicate get_saved_address/save_address endpoint declarations in /app/backend/server.py (one pair at ~L2287-2302, another at ~L2469-2480+).
(Low) Update AdCreate comment in server.py to include 'footer' position.
(Info) Seed at least one Desapega product to validate absence of buy-now-btn and presence of chat-seller-btn on ProductDetailPage for desapega products.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 3008 lines — should be split into modular routers (auth, ads, wallet, admin, plans, subscriptions).
Duplicate decorated endpoint definitions (saved-address) pose maintenance risk.
Promotion plan subscribe deducts wallet but does not create any audit/transaction ledger entry — consider logging a wallet transaction for traceability.
AdSlot fails silently on axios errors (catch(() => {})) — consider logging for observability in production.
Admin subscriptions approve endpoint does not re-check plan exists/active before setting status=active.
test_credentials: admin@brane.com / Admin123! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test sellers created dynamically via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: Tests create: 1 admin-owned footer ad (cleaned up), 1 admin-owned top ad (left), 1 promotion plan (deleted at cleanup), 2 subscriptions (1 approved, 1 rejected). Also via UI, Admin Planos tab already shows 3 seeded plans Básico/Pro/Premium (presumably seeded by app init or earlier test run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, 22 tests, 100% pass). Playwright UI verified: login→/admin redirect, 21 tabs, Escrow wallets table, Planos CRUD UI with 3 plans, Anúncios form has Rodapé option, /promote shows 3 cards with carteira+PIX buttons, AdSlot rendered on /market (HomePage) when ad exists. Duplicate saved-address declarations in server.py should be cleaned up but functionally work. Personalization CSS vars were not visually diffed before/after in this pass (time-boxed); backend PUT /admin/theme persists correctly.
rca_of_the_issue: No blocking issues found. All reported bugs (escrow API, ads rendering, personalization, promotion plans feature) appear correctly implemented and integrated end-to-end.
